description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10 on ubuntu-latest. For each Python version, check out the code, set up Python, install GDAL binaries and dependencies, test with tox, combine coverage, and upload to Coveralls. Also, run a secondary job to check the test matrix status and another job to finalize Coveralls reporting.
